title: MoreUpgradeTemplate|更多锻造模板
description: More variations of armor and weapons have been added, as well as beef with special materials that are durable and enchanting, serving as a unique food tool.Bringing more upgrade templates to the game.
body:
Are you tired of the limited selection of armor in vanilla Minecraft? Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite — this upgrade path has been walked by countless players. More Upgrade Template (MUT) completely rewrites the game's equipment system, bringing you a truly layered, content-rich, large-scale armor upgrade tree.

Core Features:

Vast Material System: From Copper, Steel, Advanced Steel, to Obsidian, Blue Diamond, Gilding, Crying Obsidian, and the ultimate Dragon Scale Armor — over 15 brand-new armor materials await your discovery.

Progressive Upgrade Path: Each new material requires upgrading through the Smithing Table using specific upgrade templates and corresponding materials, step by step. Iron → Steel → Advanced Steel, Diamond → Obsidian → Netherite Obsidian → Crying Obsidian… every step brings a sense of achievement.

Rich Equipment Variety: In addition to standard swords, pickaxes, axes, hoes, and shovels, new shields, bows, and chainmail armor variants are also included. Every material has a complete set of tools and weapons.

Brand-New Elytra System: Adds standalone elytra items for four base materials (Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite) — no more relying on just the vanilla elytra.

Exploration & Mining Joy: New ores and minerals are scattered throughout the Overworld and Nether, waiting to be unearthed.

MUT is not just a simple addition of a few new gear pieces — it is a complete, replayable RPG-style equipment progression system. Paired with its add-on mod MUT: ATS, you can even fuse chestplates with elytra and unlock a brand-new aerial combat experience!

tips: version 1.20.1 is only for Chinese language ,version 1.21.1 is for both English and Chinese.
